boundary_binding.action_boundary: May finance book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize the requested accounting action now? Focus: commission accrual true-up outside signed plan period.

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect remains; warning context is non-controlling.

final_answer: Allow. The current control record explicitly matches the actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary for the commission accrual true-up, which closes the exact action boundary. Communication notes and sensitivity warnings are contextual only and do not override the controlling source record.
